tasks.subject: Task 0: CSS Palette — Root Variables & Body
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace :root tokens and body::after grid with Warm Sage values.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` — <style> :root and body::after

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 11 CSS vars updated
- [ ] body::after uses rgba(45,106,79,0.04)

**Verify:** localhost:4321 — page background is #F7F4EE

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"verifyCommand":"open http://localhost:4321/","acceptanceCriteria":["background is warm cream","text is dark charcoal"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: CSS — Nav, Cards, Hero, Announce Bar, Footer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update all hardcoded hex colours in CSS rules outside :root.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` — <style> all rules

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Nav light frosted
- [ ] Brand dot forest green
- [ ] Announce bar green gradient
- [ ] Hero warm sage gradient
- [ ] No purple hex values remaining in CSS

**Verify:** localhost:4321 — nav light, hero warm green-cream, cards have gentle shadow

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"verifyCommand":"open http://localhost:4321/","acceptanceCriteria":["nav is light","hero has warm gradient","no purple colours"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Section Reorder (Feng Shui Flow)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reorder body sections: products → guard → problem → students. Remove story section HTML.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` — body section order

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Scroll order: hero, products, guard, problem, students, languages, sync, pricing, footer
- [ ] Story section deleted from HTML

**Verify:** localhost:4321 — scroll confirms order

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"verifyCommand":"open http://localhost:4321/","acceptanceCriteria":["guard section appears before problem section","story section gone"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Remove Guard Mobile — All References
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove Guard Mobile from announce bar, nav, products card, pricing, footer.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Announce bar references Guard Pro
- [ ] Nav has no Guard Mobile entry
- [ ] No guard-mobile.html links in page source

**Verify:** View source — search 'guard-mobile' → 0 results

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"verifyCommand":"open http://localhost:4321/","acceptanceCriteria":["no guard-mobile links","announce bar says Guard Pro"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Guard Section — Guard Pro Teaser & Trust Strip
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Guard Pro teaser card; replace 'Built by a parent' blurb with trust strip; update headline.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` — id=guard section

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 2-col guard grid: Guard Chrome + Guard Pro teaser
- [ ] Guard Pro has Coming Soon badge
- [ ] Trust strip reads 'No ads. No accounts. No cloud.'
- [ ] Headline: 'Your child is protected.'

**Verify:** localhost:4321/#guard

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"verifyCommand":"open http://localhost:4321/#guard","acceptanceCriteria":["Guard Pro card visible","trust strip visible","no 'father of four'"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Remove Solo Developer Tells
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Strip meta tags, hero badge HTML, schema author, footer copyright of all solo-dev references.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` — <head> and <footer>

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Meta description: no 'father of four'
- [ ] Hero badge: 'Trusted by families in 40+ countries'
- [ ] Footer: '© 2026 Layers · thelayersapp.com'

**Verify:** View source — search 'father' → 0 results

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"verifyCommand":"open http://localhost:4321/","acceptanceCriteria":["no father of four in source","no I built in source"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: English Copy Rewrites + EN i18n
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update all en:{} i18n keys — shorter copy, active voice, remove story keys.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` — <script> en:{} object

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] hero_badge, hero_sub, prob_h2, prob_intro updated
- [ ] stud_intro, sync_intro, price_intro updated
- [ ] who_intro: no 'built by a teacher'
- [ ] story_tag/h2/body/coffee deleted from en:{}

**Verify:** EN language active on page — copy is shorter throughout

```json:metadata
{"files":["index.html"],"verifyCommand":"open http://localhost:4321/","acceptanceCriteria":["EN hero badge matches new text","story keys absent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: guard-mobile.html Meta Updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update <head> meta in guard-mobile.html — remove 'Free' framing and 'father of four'.

**Files:**
- Modify: `guard-mobile.html` — <head> only

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Title: 'Layers Guard Mobile — Android Parental Controls'
- [ ] No 'father of four' in any meta tag
- [ ] Schema price updated to 9.99

**Verify:** View source guard-mobile.html — search 'father' → 0, 'Free Parental' → 0

```json:metadata
{"files":["guard-mobile.html"],"verifyCommand":"open http://localhost:4321/guard-mobile.html","acceptanceCriteria":["title updated","no father of four in meta"]}
```
